issues.sample: USB-C ports found on the front center console and second row center console have a defective design that leads to frequent "push in" of the USB connector.  This is leading to shorts, circuit boards overheating, and potential fire risk.  It is a frequent issue reported in online f

narrative.headline: What 2024 Audi Sq7 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
